meta.title: Chadisho | Smart Digital Catalog for Shops
meta.description: Build and share beautiful product catalogs in minutes with Chadisho. Designed for shops, catalog pages, and fast customer sharing.

hero.title: Create and share your
hero.description: Chadisho helps you turn products into a clean shareable catalog page, so customers can browse, compare, and place orders faster.
hero.sampleHeroSubtitleDescription: Ready to share with your customers
hero.trustedByBadge: Now in Public Beta — Free to use

features.title: Everything you need to introduce your products
features.description: From structured product display to easy sharing links, Chadisho is designed as a production-ready catalog experience.
features.item1Description: Present products with clear sections, rich details, and readable design in both light and dark mode.
features.item2Description: Send one link instead of many photos. Share on social apps, messengers, and your website.
features.item3Description: Support both Persian and English with proper RTL/LTR layout handling for better customer reach.
features.item4Description: Built with SSR-first architecture and metadata support to improve discoverability and performance.
features.item5Description: Catalogs look amazing on any device. Your customers get a seamless browsing experience on phones and tablets.
features.item6Description: Update your catalog instantly. Changes appear live to customers without republishing or waiting.

howItWorks.title: Start with three easy steps
howItWorks.description: Launch your catalog workflow quickly without complex setup.
howItWorks.step1Description: Create your product list with title, media, pricing and details.
howItWorks.step2Description: Organize products into sections and generate a branded catalog page.
howItWorks.step3Description: Share your catalog link with customers and drive faster purchase decisions.
howItWorks.demoDescription: Watch how easy it is to create a professional catalog and share it with your customers in minutes.

download.title: Download options
download.description: Use your preferred platform. Update links from homeDownloadLinks config when ready.
download.note: You can update download URLs in src/core/config/homeDownloadLinks.ts

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about Chadisho and its features.
faq.a1: Chadisho helps you create online catalogs for your products or services, generate shareable links, and easily send them to customers through WhatsApp, Instagram, and other social platforms.
faq.q2: Can I create different catalogs for different customers?
faq.a2: Yes. You can select specific products and create personalized catalogs for each customer or customer group.
faq.a3: Yes. You can disable price visibility anytime and showcase only your products or services.
faq.q4: Is Chadisho only for physical products?
faq.a4: No. Besides physical products, you can also manage services, online courses, portfolios, and custom packages as catalog items.
faq.q5: Can I add photos and videos to products?
faq.a5: Yes. You can upload multiple images and videos for each product or service to provide a richer presentation for customers.
faq.q6: Does Chadisho support inventory management and discounts?
faq.a6: Yes. You can manage stock quantities, set pricing, and apply discounts to your products easily.
faq.q7: Does Chadisho work well on mobile devices?
faq.a7: Yes. Both the catalogs and the admin panel are fully responsive and optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
faq.q8: Can multiple people manage the same store?
faq.a8: Yes. You can give admin access to your teammates or staff members and manage your store collaboratively.

footer.description: Chadisho helps businesses build better product discovery journeys.

showcase.title: Catalogs for Every Industry
showcase.description: From fashion to electronics, create catalogs that fit your business perfectly.

testimonials.title: Loved by Businesses
testimonials.quote1: Chadisho transformed how I share products with my customers. Instead of sending 20 separate photos, I just send one link. Sales increased by 40%!
testimonials.quote2: The catalog builder has been incredibly useful, especially for me since I need to recommend different products to each customer. Now I can send personalized catalogs much faster and more professionally.
testimonials.quote3: We used to print catalogs that cost a fortune and went outdated quickly. Now we update digitally in seconds. Customers love the experience.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your First Catalog?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses already using Chadisho to showcase their products and increase sales.
